commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `packages/terminal-core/src/note.ts` to pass pre-wrapped note text to Clack through a widened virtual output stream so copy-sensitive paths and URLs are not re-wrapped.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: session-lock doctor output reaches the shared `note()` helper, and pinned Clack 1.4.0 hard-wraps final note content using `getColumns(output) - 6`. I did not run a live `openclaw doctor` scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should choose the canonical branch and decide whether to require rendered-output regression coverage before merge; there is no cleanup-close reason.
